employment.notes: Employment definitions vary by labor-force status and survey reference week.

education.notes: Map source education to broad ISCED-style levels only.

income.notes: Currency, household equivalization, tax basis, and price year differ by panel.

family.notes: Household roster and partnership definitions vary.

health.notes: Self-rated health is broadly comparable after scale harmonization.

wellbeing.notes: Life satisfaction, depression, and flourishing proxies are not interchangeable.
